title: GeopoliticalEntity catalog (hand-rolled)
description: Hand-rolled catalog of supranational groupings (continents, sub-continents, regions, economic / political / military unions and agreements). No upstream source — humans maintain. Lives alongside the pipeline-generated Tier 2 spec files at contracts/geo/ root and is consumed identically by codegen. Distinguished only by $generated: false / $source: manual.

lastEditedAt.description: Date of last human edit (YYYY-MM-DD). Different from generatedAt on pipeline-derived specs since this catalog has no regen step.

GeopoliticalEntityType.description: 23 values across 4 region-tagged categories: General Geopolitical (3), Economic (8), Political (6), Military (6).

shortCode.description: Identifier — typically the entity's well-known abbreviation (NATO, EU, ASEAN, USMCA, etc.). Continents use the ISO continent two-letter codes (AF, AN, AS, EU, NA, OC, SA).

items.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. May reference disputed entities (e.g. XK Kosovo) not present in the countries catalog — known-orphan exemptions documented in parity tests.
